story.iWant: import và use UI components từ frontend
story.soThat: popup UI matches main app design

subtasks.subtask: Import Button từ `@/components/ui/button` trong popup component
Test import resolves correctly (no build errors)
Test Button với different variants và sizes
Test all components render trong popup
Verify Tailwind CSS is loaded trong popup
Test Button với variants và sizes
Test Card với different content layouts
Test components với disabled và loading states

acceptanceCriteria.ac: Components render correctly trong extension popup

doc.title: Browser Extension Architecture
doc.section: Code Reuse Strategy - UI Components Reuse

doc.title: Story 10.3: Build Configuration & Shared Code Setup
doc.snippet: Path aliases configured (`@/*` → `../frontend/src/*`). Build tool resolves path aliases correctly.

doc.title: Story 10.4: Basic Popup Skeleton
doc.snippet: Basic popup HTML và React entry point created. Popup ready for component integration.

file.title: Button Component
file.snippet: Button component với variants (default, destructive, outline, etc.) và sizes (sm, md, lg). Uses Radix UI Slot và class-variance-authority.

file.title: Card Component
file.snippet: Card component với CardHeader, CardTitle, CardContent subcomponents. Uses Tailwind CSS for styling.

file.title: Dialog Component
file.snippet: Dialog component using Radix UI Dialog. Includes DialogContent, DialogTrigger subcomponents.

dependencies.prerequisite: Story 10.3: Build configuration với path aliases must be complete
Story 10.4: Basic popup skeleton must be created

constraints.constraint: Path aliases must resolve correctly trong build tool
Tailwind CSS must be available trong popup
Components must work as-is without modifications

testing.test: Test all imports resolve without build errors
Test components render correctly trong popup
Test components với various props và states
